name: 1Password
description: Manage secrets and items in 1Password vaults
longDescription: Access and manage secrets stored in 1Password vaults using the Connect API or Service Account SDK. List vaults, retrieve items with their fields and secrets, create new items, update existing ones, delete items, and resolve secret references.

operations.name: List Vaults
operations.description: List all vaults accessible by the Connect token or Service Account

operations.name: Get Vault
operations.description: Get details of a specific vault by ID

operations.name: List Items
operations.description: List items in a vault. Returns summaries without field values.

operations.name: Get Item
operations.description: Get full details of an item including all fields and secrets

operations.name: Create Item
operations.description: Create a new item in a vault

operations.name: Replace Item
operations.description: Replace an entire item with new data (full update)

operations.name: Update Item
operations.description: Update an existing item using JSON Patch operations (RFC6902)

operations.name: Delete Item
operations.description: Delete an item from a vault

operations.name: Resolve Secret
operations.description: Resolve a secret reference (op://vault/item/field) to its value. Service Account mode only.

name: A2A
description: Interact with external A2A-compatible agents
longDescription: Use the A2A (Agent-to-Agent) protocol to interact with external AI agents.

operations.name: Send Message
operations.description: Send a message to an external A2A-compatible agent.

operations.name: Get Task
operations.description: Query the status of an existing A2A task.

operations.name: Cancel Task
operations.description: Cancel a running A2A task.

operations.name: Get Agent Card
operations.description: Fetch the Agent Card (discovery document) for an A2A agent.

operations.name: Resubscribe
operations.description: Reconnect to an ongoing A2A task stream after connection interruption.

operations.name: Set Push Notification
operations.description: Configure a webhook to receive task update notifications.

operations.name: Get Push Notification
operations.description: Get the push notification webhook configuration for a task.

operations.name: Delete Push Notification
operations.description: Delete the push notification webhook configuration for a task.

name: Ahrefs
description: SEO analysis with Ahrefs
longDescription: Integrate Ahrefs SEO tools into your workflow. Analyze domain ratings, backlinks, organic keywords, top pages, and more. Requires an Ahrefs Enterprise plan with API access.

operations.name: Domain Rating
operations.description: Get the Domain Rating (DR) and Ahrefs Rank for a target domain. Domain Rating shows the strength of a website

operations.name: Backlinks
operations.description: Get a list of backlinks pointing to a target domain or URL. Returns details about each backlink including source URL, anchor text, and domain rating.

operations.name: Backlinks Stats
operations.description: Get backlink statistics for a target domain or URL. Returns totals for different backlink types including dofollow, nofollow, text, image, and redirect links.

operations.name: Referring Domains
operations.description: Get a list of domains that link to a target domain or URL. Returns unique referring domains with their domain rating, backlink counts, and discovery dates.

operations.name: Organic Keywords
operations.description: Get organic keywords that a target domain or URL ranks for in Google search results. Returns keyword details including search volume, ranking position, and estimated traffic.

operations.name: Top Pages
operations.description: Get the top pages of a target domain sorted by organic traffic. Returns page URLs with their traffic, keyword counts, and estimated traffic value.

operations.name: Keyword Overview
operations.description: Get detailed metrics for a keyword including search volume, keyword difficulty, CPC, clicks, and traffic potential.

operations.name: Broken Backlinks
operations.description: Get a list of broken backlinks pointing to a target domain or URL. Useful for identifying link reclamation opportunities.

name: Airtable
description: Read, create, and update Airtable
longDescription: Integrates Airtable into the workflow. Can list bases, list tables (with schema), and create, get, list, or update records. Can also be used in trigger mode to trigger a workflow when an update is made to an Airtable table.

triggers.name: Airtable Webhook
triggers.description: Trigger workflow from Airtable record changes like create, update, and delete events (requires Airtable credentials)

name: Airweave
description: Search your synced data collections
longDescription: Search across your synced data sources using Airweave. Supports semantic search with hybrid, neural, or keyword retrieval strategies. Optionally generate AI-powered answers from search results.

name: Algolia
description: Search and manage Algolia indices
longDescription: Integrate Algolia into your workflow. Search indices, manage records (add, update, delete, browse), configure index settings, and perform batch operations.

operations.name: Search
operations.description: Search an Algolia index

operations.name: Add Record
operations.description: Add or replace a record in an Algolia index

operations.name: Get Record
operations.description: Get a record by objectID from an Algolia index

operations.name: Get Records
operations.description: Retrieve multiple records by objectID from one or more Algolia indices

operations.name: Partial Update Record
operations.description: Partially update a record in an Algolia index without replacing it entirely

operations.name: Delete Record
operations.description: Delete a record by objectID from an Algolia index

operations.name: Browse Records
operations.description: Browse and iterate over all records in an Algolia index using cursor pagination

operations.name: Batch Operations
operations.description: Perform batch add, update, partial update, or delete operations on records in an Algolia index

operations.name: List Indices
operations.description: List all indices in an Algolia application

operations.name: Get Settings
operations.description: Retrieve the settings of an Algolia index

operations.name: Update Settings
operations.description: Update the settings of an Algolia index

operations.name: Clear Records
operations.description: Clear all records from an Algolia index while keeping settings, synonyms, and rules

operations.name: Delete By Filter
operations.description: Delete all records matching a filter from an Algolia index

name: Amazon DynamoDB
description: Connect to Amazon DynamoDB
longDescription: Integrate Amazon DynamoDB into workflows. Supports Get, Put, Query, Scan, Update, Delete, and Introspect operations on DynamoDB tables.

operations.name: Get Item
operations.description: Get an item from a DynamoDB table by primary key

operations.name: Put Item
operations.description: Put an item into a DynamoDB table

operations.name: Query
operations.description: Query items from a DynamoDB table using key conditions

operations.name: Scan
operations.description: Scan all items in a DynamoDB table

operations.name: Update Item
operations.description: Update an item in a DynamoDB table

operations.name: Delete Item
operations.description: Delete an item from a DynamoDB table

operations.name: Introspect
operations.description: Introspect DynamoDB to list tables or get detailed schema information for a specific table

name: Amazon RDS
description: Connect to Amazon RDS via Data API
longDescription: Integrate Amazon RDS Aurora Serverless into the workflow using the Data API. Can query, insert, update, delete, and execute raw SQL without managing database connections.

operations.name: Query (SELECT)
operations.description: Execute a SELECT query on Amazon RDS using the Data API

operations.name: Insert Data
operations.description: Insert data into an Amazon RDS table using the Data API

operations.name: Update Data
operations.description: Update data in an Amazon RDS table using the Data API

operations.name: Delete Data
operations.description: Delete data from an Amazon RDS table using the Data API

operations.name: Execute Raw SQL
operations.description: Execute raw SQL on Amazon RDS using the Data API

operations.name: Introspect Schema
operations.description: Introspect Amazon RDS Aurora database schema to retrieve table structures, columns, and relationships

name: Amazon SQS
description: Connect to Amazon SQS
longDescription: Integrate Amazon SQS into the workflow. Can send messages to SQS queues.

operations.name: Send Message
operations.description: Send a message to an Amazon SQS queue

name: Amplitude
description: Track events and query analytics from Amplitude
longDescription: Integrate Amplitude into your workflow to track events, identify users and groups, search for users, query analytics, and retrieve revenue data.

operations.name: Send Event
operations.description: Track an event in Amplitude using the HTTP V2 API.

operations.name: Identify User
operations.description: Set user properties in Amplitude using the Identify API. Supports $set, $setOnce, $add, $append, $unset operations.

operations.name: Group Identify
operations.description: Set group-level properties in Amplitude. Supports $set, $setOnce, $add, $append, $unset operations.

operations.name: User Search
operations.description: Search for a user by User ID, Device ID, or Amplitude ID using the Dashboard REST API.

operations.name: User Activity
operations.description: Get the event stream for a specific user by their Amplitude ID.

operations.name: User Profile
operations.description: Get a user profile including properties, cohort memberships, and computed properties.

operations.name: Event Segmentation
operations.description: Query event analytics data with segmentation. Get event counts, uniques, averages, and more.

operations.name: Get Active Users
operations.description: Get active or new user counts over a date range from the Dashboard REST API.

operations.name: Real-time Active Users
operations.description: Get real-time active user counts at 5-minute granularity for the last 2 days.

operations.name: List Events
operations.description: List all event types in the Amplitude project with their weekly totals and unique counts.

operations.name: Get Revenue
operations.description: Get revenue LTV data including ARPU, ARPPU, total revenue, and paying user counts.

name: Apify
description: Run Apify actors and retrieve results
longDescription: Integrate Apify into your workflow. Run any Apify actor with custom input and retrieve results. Supports both synchronous and asynchronous execution with automatic dataset fetching.

operations.name: Run Actor
operations.description: Run an APIFY actor synchronously and get results (max 5 minutes)

operations.name: Run Actor (Async)
operations.description: Run an APIFY actor asynchronously with polling for long-running tasks

name: Apollo
description: Search, enrich, and manage contacts with Apollo.io
longDescription: Integrates Apollo.io into the workflow. Search for people and companies, enrich contact data, manage your CRM contacts and accounts, add contacts to sequences, and create tasks.

operations.name: Search People
operations.description: Search Apollo

operations.name: Enrich Person
operations.description: Enrich data for a single person using Apollo

operations.name: Bulk Enrich People
operations.description: Enrich data for up to 10 people at once using Apollo

operations.name: Search Organizations
operations.description: Search Apollo

operations.name: Enrich Organization
operations.description: Enrich data for a single organization using Apollo

operations.name: Bulk Enrich Organizations
operations.description: Enrich data for up to 10 organizations at once using Apollo

operations.name: Create Contact
operations.description: Create a new contact in your Apollo database

operations.name: Update Contact
operations.description: Update an existing contact in your Apollo database

operations.name: Search Contacts
operations.description: Search your team

operations.name: Bulk Create Contacts
operations.description: Create up to 100 contacts at once in your Apollo database. Supports deduplication to prevent creating duplicate contacts. Master key required.

operations.name: Bulk Update Contacts
operations.description: Update up to 100 existing contacts at once in your Apollo database. Each contact must include an id field. Master key required.

operations.name: Create Account
operations.description: Create a new account (company) in your Apollo database

operations.name: Update Account
operations.description: Update an existing account in your Apollo database

operations.name: Search Accounts
operations.description: Search your team

operations.name: Bulk Create Accounts
operations.description: Create up to 100 accounts at once in your Apollo database. Note: Apollo does not apply deduplication - duplicate accounts may be created if entries share similar names or domains. Master key required.

operations.name: Bulk Update Accounts
operations.description: Update up to 1000 existing accounts at once in your Apollo database (higher limit than contacts!). Each account must include an id field. Master key required.

operations.name: Create Opportunity
operations.description: Create a new deal for an account in your Apollo database (master key required)

operations.name: Search Opportunities
operations.description: Search and list all deals/opportunities in your team

operations.name: Get Opportunity
operations.description: Retrieve complete details of a specific deal/opportunity by ID

operations.name: Update Opportunity
operations.description: Update an existing deal/opportunity in your Apollo database

operations.name: Search Sequences
operations.description: Search for sequences/campaigns in your team

operations.name: Create Task
operations.description: Create a new task in Apollo

operations.name: Search Tasks
operations.description: Search for tasks in Apollo

operations.name: Get Email Accounts
operations.description: Get list of team

name: ArXiv
description: Search and retrieve academic papers from ArXiv
longDescription: Integrates ArXiv into the workflow. Can search for papers, get paper details, and get author papers. Does not require OAuth or an API key.

operations.name: Search Papers
operations.description: Search for academic papers on ArXiv by keywords, authors, titles, or other fields.

operations.name: Get Paper Details
operations.description: Get detailed information about a specific ArXiv paper by its ID.

operations.name: Get Author Papers
operations.description: Search for papers by a specific author on ArXiv.

name: Asana
description: Interact with Asana
longDescription: Integrate Asana into the workflow. Can read, write, and update tasks.

operations.name: Get Task
operations.description: Retrieve a single task by GID or get multiple tasks with filters

operations.name: Create Task
operations.description: Create a new task in Asana

operations.name: Update Task
operations.description: Update an existing task in Asana

operations.name: Get Projects
operations.description: Retrieve all projects from an Asana workspace

operations.name: Search Tasks
operations.description: Search for tasks in an Asana workspace

operations.name: Add Comment
operations.description: Add a comment (story) to an Asana task

name: Ashby
description: Manage candidates, jobs, and applications in Ashby
longDescription: Integrate Ashby into the workflow. Manage candidates (list, get, create, update, search, tag), applications (list, get, create, change stage), jobs (list, get), job postings (list, get), offers (list, get), notes (list, create), interviews (list), and reference data (sources, tags, archive reasons, custom fields, departments, locations, openings, users).

operations.name: List Candidates
operations.description: Lists all candidates in an Ashby organization with cursor-based pagination.

operations.name: Get Candidate
operations.description: Retrieves full details about a single candidate by their ID.

operations.name: Create Candidate
operations.description: Creates a new candidate record in Ashby.

operations.name: Update Candidate
operations.description: Updates an existing candidate record in Ashby. Only provided fields are changed.

operations.name: Search Candidates
operations.description: Searches for candidates by name and/or email with AND logic. Results are limited to 100 matches. Use candidate.list for full pagination.

operations.name: List Jobs
operations.description: Lists all jobs in an Ashby organization. By default returns Open, Closed, and Archived jobs. Specify status to filter.

operations.name: Get Job
operations.description: Retrieves full details about a single job by its ID.

operations.name: Create Note
operations.description: Creates a note on a candidate in Ashby. Supports plain text and HTML content (bold, italic, underline, links, lists, code).

operations.name: List Notes
operations.description: Lists all notes on a candidate with pagination support.

operations.name: List Applications
operations.description: Lists all applications in an Ashby organization with pagination and optional filters for status, job, candidate, and creation date.

operations.name: Get Application
operations.description: Retrieves full details about a single application by its ID.

operations.name: Create Application
operations.description: Creates a new application for a candidate on a job. Optionally specify interview plan, stage, source, and credited user.

operations.name: List Offers
operations.description: Lists all offers with their latest version in an Ashby organization.

operations.name: Change Application Stage
operations.description: Moves an application to a different interview stage. Requires an archive reason when moving to an Archived stage.

operations.name: Add Candidate Tag
operations.description: Adds a tag to a candidate in Ashby.

operations.name: Remove Candidate Tag
operations.description: Removes a tag from a candidate in Ashby.

operations.name: Get Offer
operations.description: Retrieves full details about a single offer by its ID.

operations.name: List Sources
operations.description: Lists all candidate sources configured in Ashby.

operations.name: List Candidate Tags
operations.description: Lists all candidate tags configured in Ashby.

operations.name: List Archive Reasons
operations.description: Lists all archive reasons configured in Ashby.

operations.name: List Custom Fields
operations.description: Lists all custom field definitions configured in Ashby.

operations.name: List Departments
operations.description: Lists all departments in Ashby.

operations.name: List Locations
operations.description: Lists all locations configured in Ashby.

operations.name: List Job Postings
operations.description: Lists all job postings in Ashby.

operations.name: Get Job Posting
operations.description: Retrieves full details about a single job posting by its ID.

operations.name: List Openings
operations.description: Lists all openings in Ashby with pagination.

operations.name: List Users
operations.description: Lists all users in Ashby with pagination.

operations.name: List Interviews
operations.description: Lists interview schedules in Ashby, optionally filtered by application or interview stage.

triggers.name: Ashby Application Submitted
triggers.description: Trigger workflow when a new application is submitted

triggers.name: Ashby Candidate Stage Change
triggers.description: Trigger workflow when a candidate changes interview stages

triggers.name: Ashby Candidate Hired
triggers.description: Trigger workflow when a candidate is hired

triggers.name: Ashby Candidate Deleted
triggers.description: Trigger workflow when a candidate is deleted

triggers.name: Ashby Job Created
triggers.description: Trigger workflow when a new job is created

triggers.name: Ashby Offer Created
triggers.description: Trigger workflow when a new offer is created

name: AWS Textract

longDescription: Integrate AWS Textract into your workflow to extract text, tables, forms, and key-value pairs from documents. Single-page mode supports JPEG, PNG, and single-page PDF. Multi-page mode supports multi-page PDF and TIFF.

name: Azure AD

operations.description: Create a new user in Azure AD (Microsoft Entra ID)

operations.name: Delete User
operations.description: Delete a user from Azure AD (Microsoft Entra ID). The user is moved to a temporary container and can be restored within 30 days.

operations.name: List Groups

operations.description: Get a group by ID from Azure AD (Microsoft Entra ID)

operations.name: Remove Group Member

name: Microsoft Dataverse
description: Manage records in Microsoft Dataverse tables
longDescription: Integrate Microsoft Dataverse into your workflow. Create, read, update, delete, upsert, associate, query, search, and execute actions and functions against Dataverse tables using the Web API. Supports bulk operations, FetchXML, file uploads, and relevance search. Works with Dynamics 365, Power Platform, and custom Dataverse environments.

operations.name: List Records
operations.description: Query and list records from a Microsoft Dataverse table. Supports OData query options for filtering, selecting columns, ordering, and pagination.

operations.name: Get Record
operations.description: Retrieve a single record from a Microsoft Dataverse table by its ID. Supports $select and $expand OData query options.

operations.name: Create Record
operations.description: Create a new record in a Microsoft Dataverse table. Requires the entity set name (plural table name) and record data as a JSON object.

operations.name: Update Record
operations.description: Update an existing record in a Microsoft Dataverse table. Only send the columns you want to change.

operations.name: Upsert Record
operations.description: Create or update a record in a Microsoft Dataverse table. If a record with the given ID exists, it is updated; otherwise, a new record is created.

operations.name: Delete Record
operations.description: Delete a record from a Microsoft Dataverse table by its ID.

operations.name: Create Multiple
operations.description: Create multiple records of the same table type in a single request. Each record in the Targets array must include an @odata.type annotation. Recommended batch size: 100-1000 records for standard tables.

operations.name: Update Multiple
operations.description: Update multiple records of the same table type in a single request. Each record must include its primary key. Only include columns that need to be changed. Recommended batch size: 100-1000 records.

operations.name: FetchXML Query
operations.description: Execute a FetchXML query against a Microsoft Dataverse table. FetchXML supports aggregation, grouping, linked-entity joins, and complex filtering beyond OData capabilities.

operations.name: Search
operations.description: Perform a full-text relevance search across Microsoft Dataverse tables. Requires Dataverse Search to be enabled on the environment. Supports simple and Lucene query syntax.

operations.name: Execute Action
operations.description: Execute a bound or unbound Dataverse action. Actions perform operations with side effects (e.g., Merge, GrantAccess, SendEmail, QualifyLead). For bound actions, provide the entity set name and record ID.

operations.name: Execute Function
operations.description: Execute a bound or unbound Dataverse function. Functions are read-only operations (e.g., RetrievePrincipalAccess, RetrieveTotalRecordCount, InitializeFrom). For bound functions, provide the entity set name and record ID.

operations.name: Upload File
operations.description: Upload a file to a file or image column on a Dataverse record. Supports single-request upload for files up to 128 MB. The file content must be provided as a base64-encoded string.

operations.name: Download File
operations.description: Download a file from a file or image column on a Dataverse record. Returns the file content as a base64-encoded string along with file metadata from response headers.

operations.name: Associate Records
operations.description: Associate two records in Microsoft Dataverse via a navigation property. Creates a relationship between a source record and a target record. Supports both collection-valued (POST) and single-valued (PUT) navigation properties.

operations.name: Disassociate Records
operations.description: Remove an association between two records in Microsoft Dataverse. For collection-valued navigation properties, provide the target record ID. For single-valued navigation properties, only the navigation property name is needed.

operations.name: WhoAmI
operations.description: Retrieve the current authenticated user information from Microsoft Dataverse. Useful for testing connectivity and getting the user ID, business unit ID, and organization ID.
